name: Maronan Metals Limited
analysis: MMA's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 29% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.5× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$0.4650. Trade idea: entry A$0.4900, stop A$0.3416, target A$0.5600 (0.47:1) — then trail it.
